component.name: Claude Code Usage
component.summary: Monitor Claude Code weekly and session usage budget

description.p: A COSMIC panel applet that displays Claude Code usage metrics directly in the system panel. Shows weekly and session budget consumption with pace-based color coding to help manage your Claude Code interaction limits.

ul.li: Real-time weekly usage tracking (out of 1,000 interactions)
Daily budget pace indicator with visual color coding
Detailed popup dashboard with progress bars and time-to-reset information
Configurable polling interval and work week settings
Panel icon with colored usage percentage
OAuth token integration with Claude CLI credentials
